label: New
items: Harvest tasks now use a "window" model — one task per harvest window instead of a new task every day. No more overdue pile-ups when your tomatoes aren't quite ripe on day one.
Inside the harvest window a green "Harvest window · N days left" pill replaces the standard task footer with three actions: Harvested · Not yet · Check with AI.
"Not yet" snoozes the task for 3, 5 or 7 days (capped at window close) — no more deleting or repeated postponing.
"Check with AI" sends a photo to Rhozly AI, which reads the crop's ripeness and either marks it ready or automatically snoozes by the estimated days-until-ripe.

label: Improved
items: Harvest tasks only flag as overdue once the window has actually closed — and even then, you get two clear choices: "Log yield anyway" or "Mark missed".
Today / Calendar list cards now show in-window harvest tasks with a green tile so they read as upcoming, not nagging.
